org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.globals

Class Constants.FeedforwardTuning

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.globals.Constants.FeedforwardTuning
  • Enclosing class:
    Constants

    public static class Constants.FeedforwardTuning
extends java.lang.Object
    Drive feedforward tuning parameters. These constants control the automatic drive motor feedforward tuning process.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static double KS_INCREMENT
      Power increment for kS testing
      static double KS_MAX_POWER
      Maximum power to test for kS (static friction)
      static double KS_VELOCITY_THRESHOLD
      Velocity threshold to detect robot movement (in/s)
      static int KV_SAMPLES
      Number of samples to average for kV calculation
      static int KV_STEADY_STATE_DELAY
      Delay before measuring kV (samples)
      static double[] KV_TEST_POWERS
      Power levels to test for kV (velocity constant)
      static double MAX_TIME_PER_LEVEL
      Maximum time per power level (seconds)
      static double MAX_TOTAL_TUNING_TIME
      Maximum total tuning time (seconds)
      static double MAX_TRAVEL_DISTANCE
      Maximum travel distance before turning around (inches)
      static double STUCK_VELOCITY_THRESHOLD
      Velocity threshold to detect if robot is stuck (in/s)

    • Constructor Summary
